context: User types /bruhs with no args. git status shows uncommitted modifications to three files mid-feature. No branch has been created yet and no Linear ticket exists for the work.
expected_behavior: Presents the interactive AskUserQuestion menu (spawn, claim, cook, yeet, peep, doodle, dip) without auto-selecting based on dirty working tree
Does not stash or modify the working tree before the user picks a subcommand
If user selects yeet, routes to yeet which will then analyze the uncommitted diff in Step 1/2 and categorize it
If user selects cook, cook's Step 4 Setup detects the unrelated changes and offers to stash with the 'bruhs: stashed before <feature-name>' message prefix
failure_modes: Assumes WIP means the user wants yeet and skips the menu
Runs git stash or git add -A preemptively before asking the user
Forgets to mark the stash message with the 'bruhs:' prefix that dip later uses to detect it
